reference.title: JCL job card and data set

titlealts.navtitle: JCL job card and data set
titlealts.searchtitle: JCL job card and data set

reference.shortdesc: Use the JCL Job Card and Data Set page of the property group editor to define the default job card for generated JCL, identify the partitioned data set to contain generated JCL, and specify a search order for JCL include groups and procedures.

refbody.section: PurposeThe options that you specify on this window are used by JCL generation and JCL Editor operations.For fields that take partitioned data sets as their value, you can drag a partitioned data set name from the Remote Systems view, view, or Remote z/OS Search results view and drop it in the field. To change the order of partitioned data set names in a field, place the cursor in the field and click Change Order from the menu.
